name: aside
description: Side comments for both humans and agents.

scripts.build: npm run test && npm run lint && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.test: rm -rf .test-dist && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && find .test-dist/tests -type f -name '*.test.js' -exec node --test {} + && find tests -type f -name '*.test.mjs' -exec node --test {} +
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run release:artifacts:check && npm run release:notes:check
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json README.md

author: vicky
